message:
🌱 Add argo-events: Create exotic equivalent for Jetstream EventBuses mission (#901)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,82 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-events-2462-create-exotic-equivalent-for-jetstream-eventbuses",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-events: Create \"exotic\" equivalent for Jetstream EventBuses",
+    "description": "Create \"exotic\" equivalent for Jetstream EventBuses. Requested by 12+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo-events deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo-events version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nhelm list -n argo-events 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working argo-events installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-events configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-events configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-events\n```\nSTAN [is being deprecated](https://docs.nats.io/legacy/stan/intro#warning-deprecation-notice) and [JetStream](https://docs.nats.io/nats-concepts/jetstream) is set to replace it."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Create \"exotic\" equivalent for Jetstream EventBuses",
+        "description": "I would like to try my hand at this\n\nFor NATS streaming exotic, the format is \n```yaml\nspec:\n  nats:\n    exotic:\n```\nand for native, the format is\n```yaml\nspec:\n  nats:\n    native:\n```\nThis differs in the format for jetstream native which is\n```yaml\nspec:\n  jetstream:\n```\nSo how should I go ahead\n```yaml\nspec:\n  nats:\n    exotic:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade argo-events to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade argo-events:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade argo-events argo-events/argo-events --namespace argo-events\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events\nhelm list -n argo-events\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get events -n argo-events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Create \"exotic\" equivalent for Jetstream EventBuses\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I would like to try my hand at this\n\nFor NATS streaming exotic, the format is \n```yaml\nspec:\n  nats:\n    exotic:\n```\nand for native, the format is\n```yaml\nspec:\n  nats:\n    native:\n```\nThis differs in the format for jetstream native which is\n```yaml\nspec:\n  jetstream:\n```\nSo how should I go ahead on this.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "spec:\n  nats:\n    exotic:",
+        "spec:\n  nats:\n    native:",
+        "spec:\n  jetstream:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-events",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "argo-events"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events/issues/2462",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events"
+    },
+    "reactions": 12,
+    "comments": 6,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-events installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:20:03.741Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
